phrases.cultural_note: The ticket office is at the entrance, a standard setup for museums in Portugal.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a bilheteira fica na entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh FEE-kuh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the ticket office is at the entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, the ticket office is at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh FEE-kuh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, a bilheteira fica na entrada.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Coleção de Relógios?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH reh-LAW-zheeoosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção ou ao guia local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception or the local guide.

responses.english: Ask at the reception or the local guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW OW GEEUH loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte na receção ou ao guia local.
